compiled_state.title: Author eval config for  skill
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Description

Author a complete (non-TODO) eval config for the  skill using the generator workflow.

**No code changes** — YAML config file only. Unit test exemption: declarative YAML, no conditional logic, eval config IS the behavioral test.

## Steps

1. Run generate-skill-eval.sh  to create scaffold with TODO markers
2. Run run-skill-evals.sh plugins/dso/skills//evals/promptfooconfig.yaml to confirm TODOs cause eval failure (RED baseline)
3. Read plugins/dso/skills//SKILL.md to identify named behavioral properties
4. Replace TODO markers with 2-3 test cases exercising named behavioral properties: 
5. Use Haiku as default grader model (cheapest viable); Sonnet override only if rubric requires nuanced judgment
6. Run run-skill-evals.sh on the completed config to verify all assertions pass (GREEN)
7. Reference existing evals (brainstorm, fix-bug, oscillation-check) as quality templates

## File Impact
- CREATE: plugins/dso/skills//evals/promptfooconfig.yaml

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] ruff check passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] Eval config exists
  Verify: test -f $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills//evals/promptfooconfig.yaml
- [ ] Contains at least 2 test cases with llm-rubric assertions
  Verify: grep -c 'type: llm-rubric' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills//evals/promptfooconfig.yaml | awk '{exit ($1 < 2)}'
- [ ] Assertions exercise named behavioral properties (not just 'output is not empty')
  Verify: grep -q '' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills//evals/promptfooconfig.yaml
